title: Senior Doctor - Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd!
